articles.author: Patrick Marley, Hannah Knowles, Erin Cox
articles.title: Republicans who crossed Trump lose in Indiana; Ramaswamy advances in Ohio - The Washington Post
articles.description: Primaries in Indiana and Ohio reinforced President Donald Trump’s power in the GOP and set the stakes for several top-tier midterm races.
articles.content:
Two brand-name politicians advanced in Ohios primaries Tuesday, while President Donald Trump successfully exacted revenge on Indiana Republicans who defied him.
In Indiana, seven GOP state senators … [+150 chars]
